stemHtml: You must make an emergency landing at an aerodrome located near mountainous terrain. During the descent and approach briefing, which of the following is most critical to highlight?

options.a: Turbulence can be expected inside lenticular clouds associated with the mountains.
options.b: Rotor zones and breaking waves extending up to the tropopause may cause structural stress on the aircraft.
options.c: Turbulence is likely on the windward side of the mountains at various altitudes.
options.d: Significant clear air turbulence (CAT) may occur due to atmospheric instability near the mountains.
